summary: Run the first bounded Ramsey/T2star scout on accepted aligned candidate image145844_reimage_r03 after weak-pi pODMR refined the usable resonance to 3.876 GHz.
scientific_rationale: Weak-pi pODMR completed with a clear raw/readout-aware dip at 3.876 GHz: raw signal, point-wise ratio, and reference-line normalization all minimize at that grid point, all four averages share the signal minimum, and the raw drop is about 14.3% vs edge median. Ramsey/T2star is now the requested targeted follow-up. The active auto__ramsey XML/manifest was inspected: a one-dimensional tau scan calls ramsey(..., tau, det, ...) and readout2 is the Ramsey signal when full_experiment=0. The initial 8 us/51 point plan exceeded the 450 s advisory cap, so this intent uses a revised 6 us/31 point scout with det=1.5 MHz. The model gives B about 359.3 G and 13C Larmor about 0.385 MHz; the revised grid has 166.7 kHz FFT bin spacing and 2.5 MHz Nyquist, covering det + 13C sideband + +/-0.5 MHz pODMR center uncertainty while keeping the advisory per-average window below cap.
comparison_targets: NV_RESEARCH_KNOWLEDGE Shot Budget And Data Quality 2026-05-11 Ramsey FFT sampling guardrail
expected_evidence: terminal Ramsey savedexperiment with raw readouts
FFT of detrended/windowed Ramsey signal compared to det=1.5 MHz and expected 13C sideband separation about 0.385 MHz
success_criteria: bridge execute completes with nonzero acquired data
raw readouts show analyzable Ramsey signal above drift/noise/baseline variation
data quality permits either a supported T2star estimate or a clear next-step decision
FFT review supports or rejects a candidate 13C sideband without relying on noise-only peaks
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
verifier or MATLAB advisory blocks execute
RunExperiment aborts or returns zero averages/no saved data
bridge_action: execute managed single-item batch for auto__ramsey Ramsey/T2star scout

planned_measurement.analysis_fit_kind: omitted; raw review and FFT first

advisory.revision_note: 8 us/51 points preview estimated 690.0266 s per average and was redesigned; this revised preview is below the cap.

result.summary: Ramsey/T2star scout completed as nv23_ramsey_20260513_185505_auto_ramsey with savedexperiment 1DExp-seq-ramsey-vary-tau-2026-05-13-185521.mat, final counts 38.249 kcps; raw/FFT review found only weak non-claim-grade oscillatory evidence, so no T2star or 13C conclusion yet.
